extract: Leafeon (Japanese: リーフィア Leafia) is a Grass-type Pokémon introduced in Generation IV. It evolves from Eevee when leveled up near a Moss Rock or when exposed to a Leaf Stone. (Specifics may differ in past games. Refer to Game data→Evolution data for these details.) It is one of Eevee's final forms, the others being Vaporeon, Jolteon, Flareon, Espeon, Umbreon, Glaceon, and Sylveon.
